title: Shoals Technologies Group Inc (SHLS) Q3 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Navigating Challenges
text: Q3 2024 showed mixed results for the solar infrastructure company. Revenue reached $102.2 million, representing a decline of 23.9% year-over-year, but a 2.9% increase sequentially. The company reported a net loss of $0.3 million compared to $9.8 million in the prior year period. Profitability metrics included adjusted EBITDA of $24.5 million with a 24.0% margin, and adjusted net income of $13.9 million—down substantially from $33.4 million year-over-year. Project delays significantly impacted performance, with 60% of utility scale solar projects delayed, impacting revenue recognition. Additionally, the company incurred a $13.3 million charge for wire insulation remediation that affected gross profit margins. Management provided 2024 full-year guidance: Revenue $390-400 million, Adjusted EBITDA $96-101 million, Operating cash flow $70-80 million, Q4 revenue $97-107 million. CEO Brandon Moss highlighted the favorable ITC determination in their patent case against Voltage, noting the company signed up four new EPC customers following the initial ITC ruling. The company also quoted nearly $2 billion in projects during the year.
